Features

Built by investors, for investors. Every feature is designed to save you time and sharpen your analysis.

AI
AI Analyst
Powered by Claude. Get institutional-grade bull/bear cases, valuation breakdowns, and risk assessments in seconds — not hours.
Bull Case Bear Case DCF Risk Peer Compare
AI VERDICT — NVDA
NVIDIA's data center revenue continues to beat consensus. Blackwell architecture demand is pulling forward hyperscaler capex. Undervalued on a 3-year DCF basis despite near-term multiple compression risk.
STRONG BUY Target: $1,150

How to use
Compound commands — ticker + function:
AAPL GP
Apple price chart
TSLA EARN
Tesla earnings history
NVDA OPT
NVIDIA options chain
Or just the function name:
CALENDAR
Goes straight to calendar
HM
Goes straight to heatmap
?toggle menu ↵execute /focus bar ESCclose Click any function to run it, or type it in the bar

Best Case (Top 1%)
Interpretation: The simulation runs 1,000 random paths based on your annual return and volatility assumptions. The median is the most likely outcome; the 10th and 90th percentiles show the realistic downside/upside range.

Daily Market Report SIMULATED

Market Overview
Indices consolidating near highs. Tech sector outperforming. Fed rhetoric hawkish but easing cycle likely beginning.
Key Movers
NVDA +4.2% on AI demand. TSLA -2.1% on delivery miss. AAPL stable near 52W high. META continues buyback-driven rally.
Macro Focus
Fed rate decision looming. Market pricing in 2 cuts by year-end. Inflation trending toward 2% target. Labor market resilient.
Analyst Picks
BUY: AVGO, MSFT   HOLD: META, GOOG   SELL: INTC, WBA
Generated: Today · Data is simulated for demonstration

Weekly Themes

AI Infrastructure
Data centers, power grids, and chip demand continue to accelerate. NVDA, SMCI, VST outperforming.
Rate Sensitivity
REITs and utilities gaining traction as rate cut expectations increase. XLU and XLRE recovering.
M&A Activity
Merger activity picking up in healthcare and software. Watch for deal premiums lifting sector multiples.
Consumer Pressure
Low-income consumer spending showing stress. Retail and restaurants issuing cautious guidance.
Search for a ticker to detect unusual activity
